jsonLd.title: CONCOR is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Warehouse Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
